name: Easy Fudge Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 Egg beaters® (99% egg substitute) or equivalent to 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a 9 x 13-inch baking pan with nonstick spray.
3. Whisk flour and baking soda in a bowl.
4. Heat sugar, margarine, and buttermilk stirring constantly in a saucepan over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
5. Remove from heat. Add cocoa. Stir until smooth.
6. Allow to cool for 10 minutes.
7. Add eggs, one at a time, to the sugar mixture; stir well after each addition.
8. Add vanilla. Stir in flour mixture.
9. Pour batter into pan.
10. Bake until done, 18 - 20 minutes. Cool in pan on wire rack.
